title: Why Is Universal Health Services (UHS) Down 7.4% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Universal Health Services (UHS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Is Universal Health Services Stock a Bargain Following Hospital Closure?
text: Closing down the 282-bed Desert Springs Hospital in Las Vegas hit UHS with a $57.6 million one-time charge. The end of government COVID-19 reimbursements also affected the bottom line.

title: Universal Health (UHS) Up 26% in 6 Months: More Room to Run?
text: Universal Health (UHS) is well-poised for growth on the back of improved patient volumes, acquisitions and robust cash-generating abilities.

title: UNIVERSAL HEALTH SERVICES, INC. TO PRESENT AT CITI'S 2023 HEALTHCARE SERVICES, MEDTECH, TOOLS & HCIT CONFERENCE
text: KING OF PRUSSIA, Pa. , March 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE: UHS) announced today that Steve Filton, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer will participate in a fireside chat at Citi's 2023 Healthcare Services, MedTech, Tools & HCIT Conference in New York, New York on Thursday, March 2, 2023 at 3:30pm (EST).
